location: Boston, MA · New York City, NY · San Francisco, CA
hero_headline: Applied AI Architect is the job I already do: consultant by day, Claude builder by night. I built this page 8 minutes after the role surfaced.
hero_subline: This role needs someone who can move from an executive's business case to an engineer's eval harness in one meeting. I do both: enterprise delivery as a Senior Consultant at Capgemini Invent, and production Claude systems on my own time.
pitch_oneliner: Week 1: shadow one enterprise evaluation, rebuild it as a reproducible eval harness on the Claude API and MCP, and hand the account team a deployment architecture the customer's own engineers can merge.

jd_match.requirement: Trusted technical advisor guiding enterprises from discovery through deployment
jd_match.proof: Senior Consultant at Capgemini Invent: I translate between executive business cases and engineering delivery for large organizations every week.

jd_match.requirement: Integrate Claude into an existing technology stack and move a real metric
jd_match.proof: Embedded LLMs into the live recruitment workflow at Eurofirms, a TOP-3 EU staffing firm, in the hands of 500+ recruiters.

jd_match.requirement: Develop evaluation frameworks and scalable LLM architectures
jd_match.proof: I run empresaAI in production: 7 agents over a file-based bus with deterministic state and guardrails, built on the Claude API and MCP.

jd_match.requirement: Deliver technical content from engineering deep-dives to executive conversations
jd_match.proof: ManoloBot ships and explains one Next.js app per day in public; I write for builders and executives alike.
